texto: I’ve written for those who want to learn, truly learn, about a community with which they aren’t familiar. Or for those who have preconceptions but can admit they may not be entirely accurate (and, in some cases, that they are completely wrong). This means my reader must possess an open mind and a certain level of curiosity. If that’s you, proceed to checkout. An uncensored glimpse behind the curtain, hairy backs and all, awaits.

texto: My life is fairly normal. I didn't wake up one morning and find out that I'm suddenly a star, with people clamoring at me. I feel like I'm moving up the ladder just a little, which is fine.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Daniel Stern: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “My life is fairly normal. I didn't wake up one morning and find out that I'm suddenly a star, wit…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, moving, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e moving.

texto: I’m no expert, no natural-born talent, definitely no guru. As you’ll soon learn, only through a colossal experiment in trial and error did I reach the sexual summit. Although I own up to having worn a cape in a few intimate scenarios, I don’t possess supernatural powers of any kind. Perhaps my IQ is slightly above average, but Mensa isn’t busting down my door. If pressed to define myself, I’d say I’m Horatio Alger between the sheets: a self-made swinging single male. . . with a hefty dose of Buster Keaton mixed in.

texto: The only other thing I can really remember wanting to do besides acting was a gas station attendant. At the time, that seemed like a great job - wash the windows, pump the gas - it looks so cool coming home with black hands. There's a natural transition, from wanting to be a gas station attendant to being an actor, right?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Daniel Stern: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “The only other thing I can really remember wanting to do besides acting was a gas station attenda…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, time, home pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e home.

texto: The selection process is simple. Hubby exhausts every ploy in his psychological arsenal to filter out the liars, fakes, and undesirables. (If only every husband were so devoted . . .) Me, I try to prove that I’m not the stereotypical single male. That I’m in the Lifestyle for the right reasons. That I’m courteous and respectful. All of which are true, but the burden of proof is onme. It always is.
